arts.ttl: Jones, Watkins put new-look England top of group
arts.sum: England eased past hosts Greece 3-0 in their Nations League match on Thursday to go top of their Group B2 and head into their last matchday against Ireland playing for promotion.

arts.ttl: Lee Carsley delivers verdict on Curtis Jones and Morgan Rogers after their England debuts
arts.sum: Liverpool midfielder Curtis Jones and Aston Villa winger Morgan Rogers were both handed their England debuts in their Nations League trip to Greece on Thursday...

arts.ttl: Jude Bellingham poses Thomas Tuchel dilemma as Harry Kane forced into new England role
arts.sum: Jude Bellingham was the stand-out performer in England's impressive win in Athens - and the 21-year-old is already showing the signs he should succeed Harry Kane as captain

arts.ttl: Lee Carsley says Greece victory shows England ‘moving in the right direction’
arts.sum: Ollie Watkins justified his selection ahead of captain Harry Kane, who was dropped to the bench, with an early opener in Athens.

arts.ttl: Greece 0-3 England player ratings: Ollie Watkins, Jordan Pickford shine in vital Three Lions win
arts.sum: Sports Mole looks at how the players performed during Thursday's UEFA Nations League clash between Greece and England.

arts.ttl: England player ratings vs Greece – Madueke and Jones shine
arts.sum: England earned a vital victory in their pursuit of Nations League promotiom as they comfortably beat Greece in Athens. Ollie Watkins’ early strike put the Three Lions in control of proceedings before Greece goalkeeper Odisseas Vlachodimos inadvertently diverted the ball into his own net in the second period. Debutant Curtis Jones then expertly netted his […] The post England player ratings vs Greece – Madueke and Jones shine first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Ollie Watkins and Curtis Jones grab their chance to help England sink Greece
arts.athr: David Hytner at Olympiako Stadio Spyros Louis
arts.sum: It was the night when Lee Carsley dropped Harry Kane and came up smelling of roses, this a result not only to avenge the shapeless 2-1 Wembley defeat against Greece in October but to put England on the verge of automatic promotion back into the Nations League’s A section. It is difficult to remember Kane ever being axed for an England game, let alone a must-win big one – rather than rested or rotated. And it was especially bold from Carsley given he was without a host of big names. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: English media reacts to Curtis Jones' England debut as Liverpool star scores superb goal v Greece
arts.sum: The Reds ace had a night to remember!

arts.ttl: Curtis Jones becomes first Liverpool player in 42 years to score on England debut
arts.sum: Curtis Jones celebrated a dream debut for England after scoring in the 3-0 win over Greece in Athens. England got back on track for UEFA Nations League promotion with a comfortable win over Greece to reclaim top spot in the group. arts.ttl: Curtis Jones sends message to Thomas Tuchel as Lee Carsley finally gets England reward
arts.sum: GREECE 0-3 ENGLAND: Lee Carsley was forced to shuffle his pack with a number of established stars missing but the Three Lions' next generation made their point to incoming boss Thomas Tuchel
